guide:
## Siloth Ring Hunt & Gather Quest

The **Siloth Ring** Hunt and Gather (HnG) quest is popular for leveling toons **level 30-45**. Speak to **Sergeant Sturgol**, located in the tower directly above the entrance to FW. If you are evil and the FW NPCs are red-faced to you, turn into your first were-form, then recon—NPCs should be white-faced and you can log the quest.

You are rewarded for every **four Siloth Insignia Rings** turned in to Sergeant Sturgol. Using **luck or XP pots** will make this more profitable.

Once you reach **level 46**, speak to **Captain Riloh** in the same tower, on the opposite side, to log a new Siloth quest. The required rings for this quest are harder to get and drop less often, but still provide good XP when turned in.
